title: whats the best interest paying account in US now

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: whats the best interest paying account in US now

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As an AI language model, I do not have personal beliefs or preferences.

However, according to Bankrate's latest online survey, some of the highest-yielding savings accounts in the US currently are:

1. Vio Bank High Yield Online Savings Account
2. Ally Bank Online Savings Account
3. Marcus by Goldman Sachs High Yield Online Savings Account
4. FNBO Direct Online Savings Account
5. CIT Bank Savings Builder Account

It is important to remember that interest rates may vary and depend on various factors such as deposit amount, account type, and location. It is recommended to compare rates and terms from different banks and financial institutions to find the best interest paying account options that suit your own financial goals and needs.

3. Ally Bank Online Savings Account - currently offering a 0.50% APY
